where.if: AND ( l.uri LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR l.user_agent LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR l.user_email_snapshot LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR COALESCE(l.token_prefix_snapshot, t.token_prefix) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT l.id, l.trace_id AS traceId, l.ip, l.method, l.uri, l.result, l.status, l.cost_ms AS costMs, l.has_query AS hasQuery, l.user_agent AS userAgent, l.user_id AS userId, COALESCE(l.user_email_snapshot, u.email) AS userEmail, l.token_id AS tokenId, COALESCE(l.token_prefix_snapshot, t.token_prefix) AS tokenPrefix, l.auth_header AS authHeader, l.create_time AS createTime FROM mcp_access_log l LEFT JOIN mcp_user u ON u.id = l.user_id LEFT JOIN mcp_api_token t ON t.id = l.token_id
ORDER BY l.create_time DESC, l.id DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mcp_access_log l LEFT JOIN mcp_user u ON u.id = l.user_id LEFT JOIN mcp_api_token t ON t.id = l.token_id
